title: Better World Loading
description: Adds more info to the world loading screen
body:
# Better World Loading

Enhance your Minecraft world loading screen with a sleek progress bar, detailed chunk generation stats, and optional sound feedback!

## Features

### 📊 Modern Progress Display
- Replaces the default chunk map with a clean progress bar
- Shows exact chunk count (e.g., "125/256 chunks")
- Configurable through [MidnightLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/midnightlib)

### 🔍 Detailed Chunk Information (Optional)
- Toggleable detailed chunk status breakdown:
  - Shows count of chunks in each generation phase
  - Color-coded for easy reading
  - Includes: Empty, Structure Starts, Biomes, Features, Light, Full, etc.

### 🔊 Progress Sounds (Optional)
- Gentle "hat" note sound plays as generation progresses

## Configuration
Features can be toggled via MidnightLib:
- Show/hide detailed chunk info
- Toggle progress sounds

## Why Choose This Mod?
- Cleaner visual feedback during world generation
- Actually useful information about what's loading
- Lightweight - won't impact loading performance
- Fully customizable to your preferences

Perfect for speedrunners, technical players, or anyone who wants better feedback during world loading!

Contact me on Discord @`h1ggsk` if you need help with any part of the mod!

## Requirements
- Fabric Loader
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) (required)

## If you found this mod helpful, please consider donating!

Bitcoin wallet address: `bc1qzhuf0phu508ktrghw3x42cgvp9r7y0m36lt8wp`
